name: cards
description: Shared mobile-aware card renderer (BeaconCards). Any blueprint listing related notes calls customJS.BeaconCards.render(dv, opts) instead of Dataview tables. Decoupled from Dataview semantics; caller supplies pages array. v0.2.3 ADDITIVE: optional badges[].style ("fill"|"outline") for Linear/Github-style status pills (dot + alpha-bg + 999px border-radius). Default "fill" preserves prior behavior. v0.2.4 PATCH: subtitle accepts (parent) => void callback in addition to string | null | {text, secondaryText}.
